notes: Gravity for Paul's Sunday. The cicadas hush, the cuff twists, the council men nod, the boat bell rings, the driver opens the door. Endgame: the brittle thing nearly shows; the crow lands; the call from Antonio arrives. Grounded reality — the office is the office because Paul has spent thirty years building it, not because the room is alive to him.

deck.title: the cuff twists
deck.flavor: the right cuff has, sometime in the last fifteen minutes, gotten a millimeter shorter than the left. you did not, today, notice yourself doing it.

deck.title: the tic near the eye
deck.flavor: the slight tic. it has been there since the seminary, with periods of remission. it is back today.

deck.title: the cicadas hush
deck.flavor: for a second, when you cross the steps, the cicadas seem to hush. nobody else notices.

deck.title: the clap on the shoulder
deck.flavor: two pieces of wood put together in a way that means something. the man does not flinch. he knows the clap.

deck.title: the water glass does not refill
deck.flavor: gloria refills the water at the next booth. she walks past your booth without looking up. she has not, in eleven years, looked at table 17 when you are speaking from it.

deck.title: the boat bell rings
deck.flavor: the bell above the front door. it has been ringing the same way since '83. for you, today, it rings briefly and then settles.

deck.title: the sentence lands
deck.flavor: the council man you targeted goes the color the council man goes when the target has been hit. the rest of the booth pretends not to notice. nobody is fooled.

deck.title: hector does not cross himself
deck.flavor: hector sees you. he does not, this time, cross himself. that is, in his vocabulary, the more serious of the two responses.

deck.title: the long black car arrives
deck.flavor: at the curb. the driver does not get out. the door is, in the car's particular dialect, an invitation.

deck.title: the council man nods too early
deck.flavor: before you have finished the sentence. you do not lose the sentence; you adjust. the adjustment is the kind of thing the booth notices and does not say.

deck.title: the seminary memory returns
deck.flavor: you have not, today, planned to think about the seminary. you think about it for nine seconds. you set the thought down.

deck.title: the handshake held a second too long
deck.flavor: a business type's. he meant it the way some business types mean handshakes. you did not mean it back. he will, later, remember that you did not.

deck.title: the crow lands on the bandstand
deck.flavor: you are standing near the bandstand. the crow lands. it has been watching all afternoon. it has, you suspect, been watching all summer.

deck.title: the call from antonio returns
deck.flavor: your phone buzzes. d'ambrosio (a) on the screen. the younger one. you do not, this time, pick up on the first ring. you let it advance to the second.

deck.title: the office holds
deck.flavor: the day ends with the office intact. the cuff is straight. the council men have left believing what you said. the boat bell is silent.
